inputs.label: standard
inputs.dataset: Municipal building permit records, 2019-2025, covering all permits issued by the city planning department. Columns: permit_id, address, permit_type (new construction, renovation, demolition), property_type (residential, commercial, industrial), applicant_name, estimated_cost, date_issued, date_completed, neighborhood. 12,400 records. Source: City Planning Department open data portal.
inputs.sample:
P-2024-0891, 45 Elm St, renovation, residential, Smith Holdings LLC, $340000, 2024-03-15, 2024-09-20, Westside
P-2024-1203, 800 Industrial Ave, new construction, commercial, Metro Development Group, $4200000, 2024-06-01, null, Eastport
P-2025-0102, 12 Oak Lane, demolition, residential, City Housing Authority, $85000, 2025-01-10, 2025-02-28, Northgate

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.dataset: Public library lending records by branch, 2020-2025. Columns: branch_name, month, total_checkouts, digital_checkouts, physical_checkouts, new_memberships. 8 branches, 72 months each. Source: City Library System.

inputs.label: european
inputs.dataset: EU farm subsidy payments database, 2020-2025. Columns: recipient_name, country, region, payment_amount_eur, subsidy_type (direct_payment, rural_development, market_measures), farm_size_hectares, year. Approximately 2.1 million records across all 27 member states. Source: European Commission DG Agriculture open data.
inputs.sample:
Agri-Corp Holdings BV, Netherlands, Noord-Holland, 2340000, direct_payment, 4200, 2024
Jean Dupont, France, Provence, 18500, direct_payment, 45, 2024
Magyar Farming Cooperative, Hungary, Pest, 890000, rural_development, 1800, 2024
Schmidt Family Farm, Germany, Bavaria, 42000, direct_payment, 120, 2024
